elements.govern_x: function govern_x(x) { state.phase += constants.omega * constants.dt; return constants.cx + constants.rx * Math.cos(state.phase) - 7; }
elements.govern_y: function govern_y(y) { return constants.cy + constants.ry * Math.sin(state.phase) - 7; }
